title: Blackmail Mechanics
description: Pressure individuals with secrets discovered through espionage. Blackmail provides leverage for favors but carries risk of exposure and retaliation. Must figure out how to pressure intended targets within rival organizations.
definition-of-done: Blackmail action using discovered secrets. Blackmail provides favor/leverage. Detection risk with consequences. Target resistance based on personality.
testing-plan: Verify blackmail action works. Test favor extraction. Verify detection risk. Test target resistance.
